title: Moderation Action Summary — 2026-04-29
body: The abuse queue has been cleared. Actions taken: BANNED — spam_wave_42 (phishing links across 6 channels), toxic_runner (repeated targeted harassment). WARNED — new_member_17 (off-topic posting), bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automation). CLOSED — report_003 and report_006 as false positives against trusted members. No trusted members were sanctioned.
